summary: Admin customers success state renders correctly with proper heading, table structure, search controls, and customer data. The interface meets all functional requirements from the screen spec including truthful customer fields, quick actions, and filter controls. However, the logged-in admin interface uses a generic dark palette that creates visual discontinuity from the defined diner brand system used on public surfaces.

violations.description: Admin interface uses generic dark palette instead of coherent brand palette shared with public surfaces, creating product identity split between logged-in and public routes

actions: Consider applying consistent brand palette treatment to admin interface to maintain visual continuity with public surfaces
Verify customer data truthfulness matches backend contract expectations
Test responsive behavior at mobile breakpoints per screen spec requirements
